action.reasoning: Observation: 10-model LightGBM ensemble trained on 2008-2021 is current best at ic_mean=0.057296, with only a small gain over 5 models but ample time remains. Analysis: more seed diversity may reduce variance, but duplicating the same hyperparameter families with different feature/bagging samples is lower risk than changing the pipeline; iteration time for 10 models was ~7 minutes, so 20 models is affordable. Decision: train a 20-model ensemble using the existing preset cycling/seed logic, smoke-test locally, and submit evaluation.
action.command: python train.py --out checkpoints/ens_full_v3_20 --num_models 20 --use_presets --include_valid_train --num_threads 20 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/ens_full_v3_20 --output local_pred_ens_full_v3_20.json
